text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Time reduced by 0.05 seconds. Conclusion—you
have become faster than before.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Really? Hehe! Guess I was on my game
today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Initiating sweep of memory banks to ascertain the
cause...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...A query. Why do you always conduct stretches
at this time of day?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's easy! It's because my trainer taught me that
it's important to stretch on days I practice.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Not only does it reduce fatigue, it's also really
relaxing! Trainer also told me I should avoid
looking at my phone before bed and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Do you carry out all of the instructions you
receive from your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Of course I do!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure everything Trainer tells me to do is
necessary and beneficial for me!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Drawing inference from past relevant statements.
Causes behind today's improved time identified.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
One, the ability to diligently execute your
trainer's instructions. Two, advice provided on the
assumption you will carry them out effectively.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The decisive factor leading to these results is the
harmonious relationship with your trainer. In other
words, you share a connection known as "trust."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're saying my trainer and I share that kind of
bond?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Th-thank you so much! Hearing that makes me
feel over the moon.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought giving my all was the only thing I could
do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined doing that would build trust
between us, and in turn help me to improve even
further!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Could you time me for one more lap? I want to
give my trainer a full report.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to tell Trainer about our discovery and how
happy I am, and I'd like to deliver it alongside an
even better time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Nishino Flower informs me of
the good news and her great time. I'll have to up
my own game and match her effort.
